title: Abnormals Compat
description: Adds compat between the Abnormals mods and various other mods!
body:
**Description:**

This datapack* adds compatability between many mods and the abnormals team's mods (currently just: Endergetic Expansion, Autumnity and Environmental) by allowing various features from these mods to be more compataible with other mods. Additonally this datapack* works on all versions and loaders of modded minecraft.

**Important Notice:**

*Keep in mind this is a datpack and not a resourcepack and can be more complicated to install and play with it is suggested to use a mod such as [Paxi](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/paxi) to make it simple.

**Supported Mods:**

- Undergarden
- Farmer's Delight
- Garden of the Dead
- Alexs Mobs
- Mowzie's Mobs
- Iron's Spells n Spellbooks
